parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({text: "🔥 *Trend Detected — Live Engine*
*Keyword:* " + ($json.keywords || $('Parse Content').first().json.keywords) + "
*Trend Score:* " + ($json.score || $('Parse Content').first().json.score) + "/10
*Articles found:* " + ($json.articleCount || $('Parse Content').first().json.articleCount) + "
*Platforms:* Twitter · LinkedIn · TikTok
*Time:* " + ($json.timestamp || new Date().toISOString())}) }}
